name: portainer-mcp
description: Manage Docker, Kubernetes, stacks, and Helm on your Portainer instance.
long_description: MCP server for Portainer. Exposes tools generated from Portainer's EE OpenAPI spec across Docker, Kubernetes, stacks, Helm, edge and admin surfaces, plus docker_proxy / kubernetes_proxy escape hatches. Runs locally over stdio and talks directly to your Portainer instance with your API key.

portainer_url.title: Portainer URL
portainer_url.description: Base URL of your Portainer instance, e.g. https://portainer.example.com

portainer_api_key.title: Portainer API key
portainer_api_key.description: An API key issued from your Portainer account. Stored in the OS keychain.

portainer_tls_verify.title: Verify TLS certificate
portainer_tls_verify.description: Uncheck for a Portainer instance using a self-signed or otherwise untrusted certificate.

portainer_read_only.title: Read-only mode
portainer_read_only.description: Only allow read operations — look but don't touch.
